summary: Ticket A: scripts/auto_promote.py + scripts/auto_promote.sh wrapper (--score floor, --model filter, dry-run default, --apply opt-in, snapshot+integrity_check before any write)

resolution.note: Auto-promote tool ships. --score floor (default 3), --model filter (default Qwen3.5-27B-UD-Q4_K_XL.gguf), --apply opt-in. Tier per-row from score (proposed for 2/3, inferred for 1). NOT EXISTS guard makes re-runs safe and prevents downgrade of verified edges. Bash wrapper handles snapshot+integrity_check before --apply. Live dry-run shows 2,062 score=3 candidates across 10 traditions; no DB writes.
